metadata.description: All agent-skills vendored under this repo (own + adopted upstream), packaged as individually-enableable plugins for per-project or global scoping via enabledPlugins. Also tracks a few external plugins we don't vendor but want on the same enable/disable mechanism.

plugins.name: find-skills
plugins.description: Discover and recommend installable agent skills from the broader ecosystem when a task might already have one

plugins.name: browser
plugins.description: Browser testing and debugging with Playwright and Chrome DevTools

plugins.name: subrepo-permissions
plugins.description: Generate git -C permission rules for nested git repos in a project directory

plugins.name: docx
plugins.description: Create, read, and edit Word documents (.docx)

plugins.name: pdf
plugins.description: Read, create, merge, split, and manipulate PDF files

plugins.name: pptx
plugins.description: Create, read, and edit PowerPoint presentations (.pptx)

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create, edit, and evaluate Claude Code skills

plugins.name: jira
plugins.description: Jira issue tracking via jira-cli, with an Atlassian MCP fallback

plugins.name: bigquery-basics
plugins.description: BigQuery datasets, queries, and cost/performance guidance

plugins.name: cloud-run-basics
plugins.description: Deploy and configure Google Cloud Run services

plugins.name: cloud-sql-basics
plugins.description: Provision and configure Google Cloud SQL instances

plugins.name: gke-basics
plugins.description: Plan, create, and configure production-ready GKE clusters (Autopilot golden path)

plugins.name: google-cloud-networking-observability
plugins.description: Google Cloud networking and observability guidance

plugins.name: google-cloud-recipe-auth
plugins.description: Authentication and authorization guidance for Google Cloud services and APIs

plugins.name: google-cloud-waf-cost-optimization
plugins.description: Google Cloud Well-Architected Framework cost optimization guidance

plugins.name: google-cloud-waf-reliability
plugins.description: Google Cloud Well-Architected Framework reliability guidance

plugins.name: google-cloud-waf-security
plugins.description: Google Cloud Well-Architected Framework security guidance
